info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Customer Master Data (Business Partner) API
info.description:
Manage customer master data including business partner records, addresses, contact information, bank details, tax numbers, and customer-specific sales area data. This OData service (API_BUSINESS_PARTNER) provides access to business partner records used across SAP S/4HANA modules. Business partners can be of category Person (1), Organization (2), or Group (3).

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
